chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-356 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1786/2025 2. For hearing of main case 11-02-2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan Advocate for Petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Briefly stated the Petitioner has been proceeded against by the department and the Order-in-Original provided for suspension.The same is under appeal, however, the present petition has been filed seeking for the suspension to be removed pending the said appeal. No cause arises for recourse the writ jurisdiction as appropriate remedy has already been sought and even otherwise such relief in writ jurisdiction would not only usurp the jurisdiction of the statutory forum but also amount allowing final relief as an interim measure. Petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
